afterText: KITCHENPERMIT HOME SERVICE REPORT SAMPLE RESOURCES PRICING ACCOUNT Company Reports ACCOUNT / SERVICE RECORDS Service record workspace Review saved restaurant reports, next service dates, customer resend copy, and company details from one working surface. NEW REPORT COMPANY INFO SIGN OUT New report Create a restaurant-ready link and PDF. Next dates Jump to the scheduled service queue. Company info Update branding and contact details. ACCOUNT STATUS COMPANY ACTIVE $79/mo Company access is active for local testing. Saved company info, clean PDFs, live report links, and history unlock while access is active. Already-created paid links and PDFs stay available. BUILD REPORT PLAN AQH COMPANY PROFILE NEEDS REVIEW Axis1 Qa 1779169153943 Hood Cleaning Set the company name, phone, service area, logo or initials, and report color before sending paid records. CLOSE EDITOR Phone format: (213) 555-0196 Area format: Los Angeles County | Hood cleaning Appears on customer link and PDF LOGO AND REPORT COLOR The report color is just the accent line and button color on the restaurant link/PDF. Pick the color closest to your truck, logo, or website. COMPANY LOGO AQH UPLOAD LOGO Appears on the restaurant link and PDF. PNG, JPG, or WebP under 400 KB. REPORT COLOR This does not change the whole app. It only marks your customer report with one company color. ORANGE BLACK GREEN BLUE RED CUSTOM COLOR RESTAURANT REPORT PREVIEW AQH Axis1 Qa 1779169153943 Hood Cleaning Service area / kitchen exhaust service Service report prepared by Technician / crew Customer phone axis1.qa.1779169153943@example.com Service license / certification COMPANY NAME Appears at the top of every restaurant report. PHONE CUSTOMERS CAN CALL Use a 10-digit phone number so call buttons work cleanly. REPLY EMAIL Shown as the backup contact for questions or follow-up. SERVICE AREA Recommended format: metro or county | service focus. LOS ANGELES COUNTY | COMMERCIAL KITCHEN HOODS ORANGE COUNTY | RESTAURANT HOOD SERVICE OPTIONAL REPORT DETAILS Add license, after-hours, crew, or fallback initials only if they help the customer recognize the report. SAVED STATE The builder uses this company name, logo, report color, phone, and email in company mode.
